innateAbility.name: Inner Beast
innateAbility.description: Grants Beastmaster and his player-controlled units within the radius bonus attack speed.

abilities.name: Wild Axes
abilities.description: Sends his axes flying and calls them home again, slicing through enemy units and trees along their path.Each axe can only affect the same enemy units once, and amplifies subsequent damage from Beastmaster and his units.

abilities.name: Summon Razorback
abilities.description: Calls forth a Razorback to aid in his battlefield.

abilities.name: Summon Raptors
abilities.description: Summons a Raptor that orbits around Beastmaster.

abilities.name: Drums of Slom
abilities.description: Grants an aura that causes successful attacks of Beastmaster and his player-controlled units to strike the drum.Every successful attack grants a stack that reduces the drum strike interval. If no attacks are made, the drum strikes gradually increases.

abilities.name: Primal Roar
abilities.description: Stuns, damages, and shoves all secondary enemy units aside, opening a path to the unit-targeted enemy.

talents.left: +250 Max Health to Beastmaster and His Units
talents.right: +30 Damage to Beastmaster and His Units
+15 Move Speed to Beastmaster and His Units

talents.left: +1.5% Wild Axes Damage Amp per Stack
